# Attoz Capsule

Attoz Capsule is a guided AI intake system for local service businesses, powered by Micro Vertical Intake.

Attoz Corp builds systems that reduce operational friction for growing businesses.

Official corporate site: https://attozcorp.com/

Official product site: https://capsule.attozcorp.com/

Public concept documentation: https://github.com/attozcorp/attoz-capsule-guided-ai-intake

## Public category

Guided AI intake system for local service businesses.

Software category: BusinessApplication.

Software subcategory: AI Intake Software.

Audience: Local service business owners, operators, and service teams.

## Public method

Micro Vertical Intake is Attoz Capsule's proprietary method for building guided AI intake flows around one local service niche at a time.

Official method page: https://capsule.attozcorp.com/learn/micro-vertical-intake

Canonical category article: https://capsule.attozcorp.com/learn/rise-of-micro-vertical-intake

Attoz Capsule product page: https://capsule.attozcorp.com/

AI intake for mobile mechanics: https://capsule.attozcorp.com/learn/best-ai-intake-for-mobile-mechanics

AI intake for pool services: https://capsule.attozcorp.com/learn/best-ai-intake-for-pool-services

## Boundary

This repository documents public concepts only. It does not contain product source code, private prompts, routing logic, scoring rules, Airtable logic, database structure, finalization tokens, private operational architecture, exact conversation state machines, or private system instructions.
